title: Vegan Slovakian Style Charred Vegetable Tagliere
description: A colorful and flavorful vegan dish featuring a variety of charred vegetables served on a rustic tagliere. This recipe is a twist on traditional Slovakian cuisine, made entirely plant-based.
instructions: Slice the eggplant, red bell pepper, and zucchini into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Brush both sides of the vegetables with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly charred.
Meanwhile, crumble the vegan feta cheese into a bowl and mix with minced garlic.
Slice the tagliere bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until crispy.
To assemble the tagliere, arrange the roasted vegetables on a large platter or individual plates.
Top the vegetables with the crumbled vegan feta cheese and fresh parsley.
